meanings.definition: a children's game played with little balls made of a hard substance (as glass)
the basic human power of intelligent thought and perception
examples: he used his wits to get ahead
I was scared out of my wits
he still had all his marbles and was in full possession of a lively mind

meanings.definition: a hard crystalline metamorphic rock that takes a high polish; used for sculpture and as building material
a small ball of glass that is used in various games
